assertions.description: IdentityCredential is exposed for FedCM sign-in results.
navigator.credentials.get is the FedCM entry point that establishes the trust signal.
Document.requestStorageAccess is exposed for storage access requests that can consume a FedCM trust signal.
Document.hasStorageAccess is exposed for checking current storage access state.
Calling navigator.credentials.get with identity options returns a Promise and can be aborted.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'client'}]},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();p.catch(()=>{});return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: requestStorageAccess returns a Promise even when approval depends on policy or prior trust.
